textByHash.03a19881e272452ebed664fd8b379a0467793c2a: Hope the quest is going well, sir!
textByHash.108b4d6362f661b2567683dae9eb24e7616069e2: Well, it looks as if you are eligible for the quest. Grand Vizier Erkle will give you the details about the quest. You can go and talk to him about it if you like?
textByHash.2c7aa0d2962a3d47bb50d45afe09adbd9b650b72: Well, you'll need to be a legendary citizen of Gielinor.
textByHash.2dc6933650fea760d028c89b2871e4fab184409f: I hope the quest is going well madam
textByHash.334c04aa92bd3da679e997dd3e4035917918bdba: He is the head of the Legends Guild. His full name is Radimus Erkle. Would you like to talk to him about the quest?
textByHash.4668204afd0b74533f8bf64213a492fe9879c0a6: Welcome Sir! I hope you enjoy your time in the Legends' Guild.
textByHash.50188ae38b6bc3992991bdf2ea29f2a7104fe0ee: Yes, how can I help you?
textByHash.696d19ec273a111b8503aed17c32f80da4594c3f: They don't call it the Legends Guild for nothing you know! Best of luck if you intend to become a member!
textByHash.6c518dc1d9748ec1bd818d605df76f3bc005c297: If you want to enter the Legends' Guild, you'll be invited to complete a quest. Once you have completed that quest, you'll be a fully fledged member of the Guild.
textByHash.74d2934d71099ad92d37462113f7fc22c4c73928: Well, to be honest, I'm not really sure. You'll need to talk to Grand Vizier Erkle to find that out.
textByHash.78830dcbe1e40dd430c0e8da1063795655919139: Ok, very well... You need to go into the building on the left, he's in his study.
textByHash.7be957099df9f1f1f4626e0091646ed5881ecaa0: I hope the quest is going well sir
textByHash.7cf230b970014708a2c4cbb4b74af5bf17a0ff4c: Welcome! I hope you enjoy your time in the Legends' Guild.
textByHash.a0f064a98374cf002834a8a5249a218bdf95838c: That's no problem... Best of luck if you intend to become a member!
textByHash.a1aba9998b48a8016fb2d2d3b65fd4f1b38c3422: I'm very sorry but you need to complete more quests before you can go on this quest. Additionally you need to gain more quest points. They don't call it the Legends Guild for nothing you know!
textByHash.b9055d2655af6e2dc7a784f10c2f48bb39813333: Welcome Madam! I hope you enjoy your time in the Legends' Guild.
textByHash.c255e6f73ea4f424f7fe2a408c53ae37237153a7: Well, Radimus Erkle is the Grand Vizier of the Legends Guild. He's a very busy man. And he'll only talk to those people eligible for the quest.
textByHash.c6775d90fb4b9fae1ce0eb265179e5f36a6c53f9: Legendary citizens of Gielinor are invited on a quest in order to become members of the guild.
textByHash.cfaed58e5d7e571fe2ef95c3b55b38a5daf892d4: Well, you'll need to complete the following quests: , , , and .
textByHash.d0915e8f287a055669d9c430acde252073e3270e: Hope the quest is going well!
textByHash.d922fa2a3df44aebb013c234e199a07273b8a08c: You also need a total of 107 quest points.
textByHash.e94831bb126b80575975a03767b8e727b1eda374: Hope the quest is going well, madam!
